name: planning-poker-scrum
description: Scrum Planning Poker using Cloudflare Pages, Functions and D1 Database.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/static && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r static/* dist/static/
scripts.db:purge: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --command="DELETE FROM participants WHERE session_id IN (SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE created_at < (strftime('%s', 'now') * 1000 - 21600000)); DELETE FROM stories_history WHERE session_id IN (SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE created_at < (strftime('%s', 'now') * 1000 - 21600000)); DELETE FROM sessions WHERE created_at < (strftime('%s', 'now') * 1000 - 21600000);"
scripts.db:purge:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command="DELETE FROM participants WHERE session_id IN (SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE created_at < (strftime('%s', 'now') * 1000 - 21600000)); DELETE FROM stories_history WHERE session_id IN (SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE created_at < (strftime('%s', 'now') * 1000 - 21600000)); DELETE FROM sessions WHERE created_at < (strftime('%s', 'now') * 1000 - 21600000);"
